description: Contact form demonstrating Form Associated Custom Elements (FACE): native FormData submission, form.reset(), and constraint validation with no manual JS state wiring.

intent.summary: When the user asks for a contact form, native form submission, or FACE demonstration, refer to the AgnosticUI Contact Form (FACE) Playbook.

recipe.layout: Centered single-column form. Fields stack vertically: Full Name, Email, Phone (optional), Message textarea, Newsletter Frequency selection group, Preferred Contact Method radio group (in a fieldset), Subscribe checkbox, Terms toggle. Submit and Reset buttons at the bottom.

components.role: Full Name, Email, Phone, and Message fields; values surface via native FormData
Newsletter Frequency: Weekly / Monthly / Major announcements only (radio, required)
Preferred Contact Method group sharing a name attribute inside a fieldset
Required Terms acceptance with custom validationMessages for i18n
Submit and Reset form actions at the bottom of the form

recipe.notes:
No JS state needed for field values — ag-input participates in the parent <form> natively via FACE. Terms toggle with custom error copy:
```json
{ "id": "terms", "component": "AgToggle", "props": { "name": "terms", "required": true, "validationMessages": { "valueMissing": "Please accept the terms to continue." } } }
```
